prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科/历史类最低位次约72→92→86→78→91，整体在72–92名区间窄幅波动，2025年基准约91名，近5年波动幅度约20名，位次高度稳定；2021–2024年文科计划均为1人，2025年历史类计划增至3人，2026年历史类计划维持3人，较2024年及以前扩招200%，但近两年已稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2026年连续稳居第3名，为全国顶尖高校，对文科高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端等事件，但抖音热度排名第14（高 热），整体报考关注度仍处高位；历史投档异常记录为中性，未见明显断档；拥有中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A+、法学A、工商管理A、应用经济学A-等，文 科类学科实力顶尖，对文科优质生源有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 社会科学试验班涵盖经济学、金融学、法学等专业，其中法学推荐、金融/财经/经济分化观望；云南 省2026年高考总人数377900，较2025年历史类112406大幅增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；浙江大学位于浙江杭州，非本省高校，在 云南无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次91名、招生计划持平、云南省文科考生大幅增长约32%（使位次前移约15名）以及 浙大持续高热的社会关注度，预计2026年文科最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约106名，区间56–156名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 社会科学试验班（经管类，含双学士学位项目）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无其他文科招生专业
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 浙大在云南文科仅设社会科学试验班（含竺可桢学院人文社科实验班和经管类两个方向），招生计划共3人。位次在预测区间56–156名内均有希望，建议优先填报竺可桢学院方向 （位次需优于区间中位数），经管类方向作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 72 → 92 → 86 → 78 → 91, fluctuating narrowly within the 72–92 range. The baseline for 2025 is about 91, with a fluctuation range of about 20 positions over the past 5 years, indicating high stability. From 2021 to 2024, the liberal arts enrollment plan was 1 person each year. In 2025, the history category plan increased to 3 persons, and in 2026, it remains at 3 persons, representing a 200% increase compared to 2024 and earlier, but has stabilized in the last two years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, making it a top national university with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents such as academic misconduct, but its Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), indicating overall high application attention. Historical admission anomaly records are neutral, with no obvious gaps. It has disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A+), Law (A), Business Administration (A), and Applied Economics (A-), showcasing top-tier liberal arts strength that continuously attracts high-quality liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class covers majors such as Economics, Finance, and Law, among which Law is recommended, while Finance/Economics/Business are viewed with differentiation and caution. In 2026, the total number of Yunnan Province Gaokao examinees is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the 112,406 history category examinees in 2025, intensifying competition. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, not a local university in Yunnan, so there is no local preference in Yunnan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 91, the unchanged enrollment plan, the approximately 32% increase in Yunnan Province liberal arts examinees (which would shift the ranking forward by about 15 positions), and Zhejiang University's sustained high social attention, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 106, with a range of 56–156.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics and Management, including Dual Degree Programs)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
No other liberal arts enrollment majors currently
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Zhejiang University only offers the Social Science Experimental Class (including the Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class and the Economics and Management direction) for liberal arts in Yunnan, with a total enrollment plan of 3 persons. Rankings within the predicted range of 56–156 are hopeful. It is recommended to prioritize the Chu Kochen Honors College direction (ranking needs to be better than the median of the range), with the Economics and Management direction as a safe choice.
